name: ZuCo — EEG & Eye-Tracking During Reading
description: The Zurich Cognitive Language Processing Corpus: simultaneous EEG and eye-tracking from 12 adults during natural and task-specific reading of sentences. A naturalistic language dataset bridging gaze, neural activity, and NLP.
citation: Hollenstein N, et al. (2018). ZuCo, a simultaneous EEG and eye-tracking resource for natural sentence reading. Scientific Data, 5, 180291.
